name: backend-outage
title: Backend outage - kill the primary, watch the breaker open and traffic fail over
narrative: The driver stops the mock-llm-fast container (a real outage: connection refused), then drives 150 requests. The first few failures trip the circuit breaker (CB_FAILURE_THRESHOLD=5), after which the selector short-circuits the dead backend and every request is served by mock-llm-cheap via intra-request failover - clients keep getting 200s. The driver then restarts the backend, waits out the breaker cooldown (10s), and sends probe traffic to show the breaker close again. Requires docker.
watch: Grafana: 'Backend requests by backend and outcome' (traffic shifts fast -> cheap), 'Breaker state over time', 'Retries and short-circuits', and the breaker stat flipping CLOSED -> OPEN -> CLOSED.
